caption: The video captures a formal event at the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop and podium signage. A man stands at the podium on the left side of the stage, gesturing with his right hand while speaking to an attentive audience seated in rows. He is dressed in a casual blazer over a striped shirt and dark trousers. On the right side of the stage, another man sits in a chair, dressed in a suit and tie, appearing to listen intently or perhaps waiting for his turn to speak. The setting suggests a panel discussion or a Q&A session, with the audience actively engaged, some taking notes or using laptops. The atmosphere is professional and focused, typical of a conference or seminar environment.
